sourceCheckRepairs.repair: Verify the immutable production baseline and the clean PR candidate as separate artifacts.
Certify the current candidate build without falsely marking it as promoted.
Approve exactly eight mandate-generation correction paths and retain the deny-by-default scope lock.
Preserve the production certification while explicitly recording candidate divergence.

previewBaseline.source: the-it-guy/sql/schema.sql immediately before the first incremental migration, with forward transaction foreign keys deferred and missing document, signing, and private-listing foundations restored before their first dependent objects
bootstrapRepairs: defer transaction foreign keys until public.transactions exists
restore the six missing May 8 document and signing sources before their first dependent object
declare public.set_updated_at_timestamp before document triggers use it
declare tenant-isolation helpers before document policies use them
restore the missing private-listing foundation before activity migrations use it
remove embedded transaction wrappers so every restored source executes inside the baseline migration
